title: Library construction for ONT long read cDNA
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"d9t8d","text":"This protocol details the optimization of long-read cDNA library construction using ONT technology. This method allows for the successful retrieval of at least 2kb on average from mammalian samples. It has been adapted to ONT's latest chemistry 14. Phred scores above 20 can be achieved with near-full-length RNA.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: corinne blugeon
